title: Conclave on the Plight of the Refugees
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Conclave on the Plight of the Refugees''' was a conference hosted by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25.5 ABY]], in [[Government House (Worlport)|Government House]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Worlport/Legends|Worlport]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. The goal was to convince members of important [[Star system/Legends|systems]] to accept relocation of refugees from captured [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] into hopefully self-reliant communities closer to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Only several delegates were willing to agree to the plan.

Delegates arrived from planets including Ord Mantell, [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]], [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]], [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]], [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]], a world of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], and [[Ruan]] (with [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Borert Harbright]] representing the latter).

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
